prompt: A bright anime-style fantasy travel scene in front of Niseko View Plaza in Hokkaido, with a clear blue sky, scattered white clouds, and a huge snow-capped mountain rising in the background. The setting is a roadside plaza parking area with a modern black-and-wood station building on the left, visible Japanese signage reading "道の駅 ニセコビュープラザ" and "Niseko View Plaza," a vertical banner reading "ようこそ ニセコへ," a tall food sign reading "名物 じゃがいも," and a dark wayfinding sign on the right reading "ニセコ Niseko" with 4 listed icons and labels: "名産品 Local Products," "農産物直売所 Farmer's Market," "レストラン Restaurant," and "情報コーナー Information." In the center, a glamorous fox-eared anime girl sits sideways atop a giant iridescent translucent soap bubble, smiling and gesturing upward with one hand. She has shimmering pastel silver-lilac very long wavy hair, large fluffy fox ears, and a huge fluffy fox tail with rainbow-reflective highlights. Her outfit is an elaborate sparkling translucent-white and pale blue dress with holographic sheen, layered sleeves, gemstone accents, ribbons, and glossy lace-up ankle boots with bows, giving her a magical bubble-fox idol appearance. Around her float multiple smaller soap bubbles, catching rainbow light. Three fox-girl friends gather around meeting her at the plaza: 1 dark-haired fox-eared girl in a navy jacket with a Niseko patch, holding a vanilla soft-serve ice cream and looking toward the center; 1 khaki-clad fox-eared girl in an outdoor jacket and a dark cap with "HOTEL" lettering, holding a grilled corn cob; and 1 white-haired fox-eared girl in a shiny pearly hooded jacket and beret, holding a takeaway coffee cup and wearing a black backpack. Emphasize a cheerful reunion mood, travel photography composition blended with polished anime illustration, detailed environmental signage, reflective bubble surfaces, soft sunlight, crisp mountain air, and high-detail painterly rendering.
